title: Quest Battery Operated Lint Remover – Portable Fabric Shaver for Clothes, Sweaters & Upholstery | Powerful Fuzz Remover for Smooth, Clean Finish
features: Lint Remover & Debobbler for Clothes Compact Handheld Design 3 Stainless Steel Blades + Safe Blade Guard Adjustable Height Cap 60ml Removable Storage Container Operates at less than 65dB Noise Level Cleaning Brush Included Wireless Battery Powered Design - Requires 2x AA
description: Keep your clothes free of all sorts of lint and fluff with this Electric Lint Remover. It contains 3 stainless steel blades, covered by a height-adjustable blade guard, and a light plastic body for easy efficient use. The debobbler is wireless, needing 2x AA batteries (not included) to operate, and comes in a handheld size of 10 x 6 x 8cm, with its power switch being located conveniently next to the thumb position. It includes an auto power cut-out for safety, a 60ml built-in storage container, and comes with a cleaning brush to keep the head free of any debris. The lint remover makes less than 65dB of noise during use, about the same volume as a normal conversation.
